overview: Forge is an AI website builder SaaS — describe your site in plain English and get a production-ready website in seconds. Features a guided 4-step wizard, animated build process, visual editor, one-click publishing, and a full dashboard to manage your sites.
features: 4-step guided site wizard (type, niche, vibe, features)
Animated build log with live preview reveal
Visual editor with sections panel and properties
Dashboard with site stats and management
Full landing page with testimonials and bento features
